---
title: "Archives"
subtitle: "Sujets d'examens et rattrapages des années précédentes"
toc: false
---

::: {.casc-info-banner}
<i class="bi bi-archive-fill"></i>

Sujets et corrections des examens des années précédentes. Consultez-les pour vous entraîner.
:::

::: {.casc-table-wrapper}

```{=html}
<table class="casc-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th style="width: 9rem;">Année</th>
      <th>Épreuve</th>
      <th style="width: 11rem;">Énoncé</th>
      <th style="width: 11rem;">Solution</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="casc-week-badge">2023</span></td>
      <td class="casc-topic">Examen</td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn primary" href="notebooks/exam_2023.ipynb" download><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-code"></i> Notebook</a></td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn accent" href="notebooks/exam_2023_sol.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> HTML</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="casc-week-badge">2023</span></td>
      <td class="casc-topic">Rattrapage</td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn primary" href="notebooks/resit_2023.ipynb" download><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-code"></i> Notebook</a></td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn accent" href="notebooks/resit_2023_sol.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> HTML</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="casc-week-badge">2024</span></td>
      <td class="casc-topic">Examen</td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn primary" href="notebooks/exam_2024.ipynb" download><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-code"></i> Notebook</a></td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn accent" href="notebooks/exam_2024_sol.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> HTML</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="casc-week-badge">2024</span></td>
      <td class="casc-topic">Rattrapage</td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn primary" href="notebooks/resit_2024.ipynb" download><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-code"></i> Notebook</a></td>
      <td><a class="casc-action-btn accent" href="notebooks/resit_2024_sol.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> HTML</a></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
